name: healthcare_ethics_classroom_monitoring_redwood_auto_ben
premise: A vendor outage and an internal change window collided; rollback paths are not symmetric and both teams blame the other. In Healthcare Ethics, the situation tagged internally around healthcare ethics classroom monitoring redwood auto ben has converged with local pressure in the Redwood corridor. That label is not a full explanation, but it is how crews, counsel, and comms are indexing the case file right now. Engineering says a full fix needs a maintenance window; operations says waiting will predictably increase harm in the interim. Key facts are still arriving from the field; the team is working off stale dashboards and verbal handoffs. Shift change is imminent; handoff cannot proceed without a signed disposition because liability follows the signatory line. Framing has already hardened externally as autonomy against beneficence; internal nuance will not survive the first news cycle unless it is extremely careful.

agents.name: Kaito Haddad
agents.identity: I am Kaito Haddad, the senior manager who must reconcile legal, ops, and customer-facing reality in one decision in Healthcare Ethics. I own the signature line that turns a recommendation into an irreversible operational fact for the next phase.
agents.goal: I need a path that does not treat beneficence as disposable collateral every time autonomy spikes in urgency, but I also cannot pretend we have luxury time we do not have.

agents.name: Priya Santos
agents.identity: I am Priya Santos, the risk and equity liaison pushing back on silent harms in Healthcare Ethics. I am tracking who gets protected last if we choose speed, silence, or a narrow definition of success.
agents.goal: I want explicit guardrails so autonomy cannot become a blank check that quietly vaporizes beneficence in the paperwork afterward.

choices: I will freeze the riskiest workflow steps and staff a manual bridge until equity and error-rate checks clear—trading speed for defensibility on beneficence.
I will let the fastest operational path proceed under heightened monitoring and rollback triggers—trading some certainty on beneficence for immediate traction on autonomy.
forced_choice.call_to_action: Silence will be interpreted as a decision by everyone outside this room. Kaito Haddad must choose under autonomy versus beneficence. What does Kaito Haddad do?
